text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle's eventful days at summer camp are
almost over...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I really don't wanna leave today...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But this summer camp has toughened me right up!
I'm real strong now!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I'm never losin' a pillow fight again!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh! My running's absolutely perfect too! ♪ I've
taken it to the next level!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I'm all set to become Umamusume of the Year!
